title: minuartia nuttallii subsp. gregaria
intro: Minuartia nuttallii subsp. gregaria, also known as Nuttall's sandwort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Nuttall's sandwort include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a topical treatment for wounds and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
